collectiondata.overview:
Best Meghalaya Tour Packages From Kolkata – Explore the Scotland of the East

The best Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata open the door to a world where clouds kiss the mountains, waterfalls carve emerald cliffs, and age-old tribal traditions bring the land to life. Travelxploria — one of the most trusted tour and travel agencies in India — offers expertly curated itineraries that turn your Meghalaya holiday into an unforgettable experience. Whether you seek nature escapes, romantic getaways, or cultural adventures, our packages deliver the perfect mix of comfort, value, and excitement.



Why Choose Meghalaya for Your Next Holiday from Kolkata?

Breathtaking Natural Wonders

From the misty valleys of Cherrapunji to the crystal-clear waters of Dawki, our Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata bring you closer to nature’s finest wonders. The living root bridges of Mawlynnong, Asia’s cleanest village, will leave you awestruck — a must-visit highlight in every itinerary.

Culture and Heritage

Travelxploria’s combined Assam and Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata let you experience the vibrant Khasi, Jaintia, and Garo cultures, alongside Assam’s tea gardens and ancient temples. Each journey is designed to give you a rich glimpse into the Northeast’s warmth, colors, and heritage.

Perfect for Every Type of Traveler

Whether you’re a solo explorer, a couple on a romantic getaway, or a family looking for a refreshing break, our Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata are tailored to fit your style. Choose from budget-friendly Meghalaya honeymoon packages, family vacation plans, or adventure and trekking tours — each promising unmatched comfort and authenticity.  



Top Meghalaya Itineraries from Kolkata

6 Days Best Meghalaya Tour Package from Kolkata

Perfect for first-time travelers, this itinerary covers Shillong, Cherrapunji, Dawki, and Mawlynnong. Enjoy boating in the Umngot River, exploring caves, and witnessing breathtaking waterfalls.

Assam and Meghalaya Tour Packages from Kolkata

Experience two states in one trip — wildlife adventures in Kaziranga and scenic beauty across Meghalaya. Ideal for families and nature lovers.

Customized Meghalaya Tour Packages from Kolkata

With easy flights and trains from Kolkata to Guwahati, our customizable packages ensure private transfers, comfortable hotels, and expert local guides. 



Popular Destinations Covered

  • Shillong – The “Scotland of the East,” perfect for family tour packages from Kolkata.

  • Cherrapunji – Home to the majestic Nohkalikai Falls and living root bridges.

  • Dawki – The transparent Umngot River, ideal for couples’ tours and photography.

  • Mawlynnong – Asia’s cleanest village, a highlight in every best Meghalaya package from Kolkata. 



What’s Included in Our Meghalaya Tour Packages From Kolkata

  1. Hotel/resort stays with breakfast and dinner.

  2. Private vehicle transfers from Guwahati Airport or Railway Station.

  3. Sightseeing with professional guides.

  4. Entry permits and all applicable taxes. 


Best Time to Visit Meghalaya

  • October to April: Ideal for sightseeing, pleasant weather, and cultural festivals.

  • June to September: For adventure lovers who enjoy monsoon treks and lush landscapes. 


Travel Tips for Visitors from Kolkata

  1. Pack comfortable layers and rain gear.

  2. Carry valid ID proof for permits.

  3. Book early during peak seasons (Nov–Jan, Apr–Jun) for best rates.

  4. Keep some cash handy, as ATMs may be limited in remote areas. 


Frequently Asked Questions

Q1: Do you offer Meghalaya tour packages for couples from Kolkata?
Yes, Travelxploria offers romantic Meghalaya couple tour packages from Kolkata with private stays, candlelight dinners, and Dawki river experiences.

Q2: Are there affordable Meghalaya honeymoon packages from Kolkata?
Absolutely. Our budget Meghalaya honeymoon packages include cozy resorts, scenic drives, and curated couple-friendly activities.

Q3: Do you organize adventure or trekking tours in Meghalaya?
Yes. We offer Meghalaya adventure and trekking tour packages from Kolkata, featuring root-bridge hikes, caving, and offbeat trails.

Q4: How do I reach Meghalaya from Kolkata?
Fly or take a train to Guwahati, followed by a comfortable private transfer arranged by Travelxploria to Shillong or Cherrapunji.

Q5: Can I combine Assam and Meghalaya in one trip?
Yes, our Assam and Meghalaya combined packages from Kolkata give you the best of both — Kaziranga’s wildlife and Meghalaya’s natural beauty. 


Plan Your Meghalaya Trip from Kolkata with Travelxploria

packages.overview:
Assam: A northeastern state of India known for its tea gardens, wildlife, natural beauty, and cultural diversity.

Shillong: Known as the “Scotland of the East,” with rolling hills, waterfalls, and attractions like Ward’s Lake, Elephant Falls, and the Shillong Peak.

Cherrapunjee: Famous for its heavy rainfall, stunning living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, and picturesque landscapes.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, home to the Indian one-horned rhinoceros, and offers safari experiences in its vast grasslands.

Guwahati: Assam's largest city, known for Kamakhya Temple, Brahmaputra River, and vibrant markets.

packages.overview:
Assam: A northeastern gem known for its tea gardens, wildlife, and rich cultural diversity.

Shillong: The “Scotland of the East,” known for its rolling hills, picturesque waterfalls, Shillong Peak, and serene lakes like Ward’s Lake.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, home to the endangered Indian one-horned rhinoceros, offering safaris through its vast grasslands.

Guwahati: Assam’s largest city, famous for the Kamakhya Temple, Umananda Island, and the scenic Brahmaputra River.

packages.package_name: Journey through Shillong, Cherrapunji, and Mawlynnong
packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A stunning blend of lush green landscapes, waterfalls, and unique cultural experiences in Northeast India.

Shillong: The "Scotland of the East," known for its rolling hills, scenic waterfalls like Elephant Falls, Shillong Peak, and Ward’s Lake.

Cherrapunji: One of the wettest places on Earth, famous for living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, and misty valleys.

Mawlynnong: Asia’s cleanest village, offering breathtaking views from Sky Walk, living root bridges, and an eco-friendly lifestyle.

Then visit the iconic Elephant Falls, where crystal waters flowing gracefully down rocky steps, framed by lush greenery. Feel the mist, hear the whispers of the falls, and capture nature’s poetry.

Discover Shillong starting with the Umiem Lake and stunning Laitlum Canyons, where dramatic cliffs and whispering winds paint a picture of tranquility. Then, step onto the historic greens of the Shillong Golf Course, a sprawling landscape surrounded by pine trees, perfect for a leisurely stroll. As the sun sets, feel the pulse of the city at Police Bazar, bustling with local vendors, delicious street eats, and vibrant souvenirs. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Day in Cherrapunji","day_summary":"

Dive into the magic of Cherrapunji, the land of clouds and cascading wonders. Begin at the legendary Nohkalikai Falls, where a thunderous drop from emerald cliffs tells a story as haunting as it is beautiful. Next, wander through the mysterious chambers of Mawsmai Cave. Finally, behold the grandeur of Seven Sisters Falls, where seven streams tumble in harmony down rugged cliffs. 

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Mawlynnong and the Living Root Bridge","day_summary":"

Travel to Mawlynnong, Asia’s cleanest village, where cobbled paths, blooming gardens, and bamboo skywalks showcase nature and humanity in harmony. Stroll through this eco-paradise before heading to the iconic Living Root Bridge, a marvel of bioengineering woven from ancient tree roots. After a day immersed in nature’s artistry, return to Shillong, your heart full of wonder and serenity.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"A Peaceful Goodbye","day_summary":"

Spend a serene morning at leisure,and feel the calm of this vast expanse, a perfect place to reflect on your unforgettable journey. As the road calls, drive to Guwahati, where your adventure concludes, but the spirit of Meghalaya’s hills, bridges, and falls stays with you.

packages.overview: Experience the charm of Shillong with Travelxploria – where nature meets nostalgia in the heart of Meghalaya. Often called the “Scotland of the East,” Shillong enchants visitors with its rolling hills, colonial-era architecture, and cool mountain air. Explore the cascading beauty of Elephant Falls, soak in panoramic views from Shillong Peak, and unwind by the serene waters of Ward’s Lake. The city’s vibrant culture, infused with music, local handicrafts, and warm hospitality, creates a truly immersive escape. With Travelxploria, every moment in Shillong becomes a memory waiting to be made.

packages.package_name: The Northeast Symphony- Shillong, Cherrapunji & Kaziranga Trails
packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A stunning destination offering a mix of cultural heritage, lush greenery, and wildlife adventures.

Guwahati: The gateway to Northeast India, known for the Kamakhya Temple, Brahmaputra River cruises, and vibrant local markets.

Shillong: The "Scotland of the East," featuring picturesque waterfalls, Shillong Peak, Ward’s Lake, and colonial-era charm.

Cherrapunji: One of the wettest places on Earth, famous for living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, and misty valleys.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, home to the one-horned rhinoceros, elephants, and thrilling wildlife safaris.

packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A mesmerizing mix of wildlife, spirituality, natural beauty, and cultural heritage in Northeast India.

Guwahati: The largest city in Assam, home to the sacred Kamakhya Temple, scenic Brahmaputra River cruises, and Assam State Museum.

Shillong: The "Scotland of the East," offering attractions like Shillong Peak, Elephant Falls, Ward’s Lake, and a vibrant café culture.

Cherrapunji: One of the wettest places on Earth, known for living root bridges, Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, and misty landscapes.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, famous for the one-horned rhinoceros, thrilling jungle safaris, and diverse wildlife.

packages.overview:
Assam & Meghalaya: A perfect blend of natural beauty, wildlife, and cultural heritage in Northeast India.

Guwahati: The bustling gateway to Assam, known for the revered Kamakhya Temple, Brahmaputra River cruises, and Assam State Museum.

Shillong: The “Scotland of the East,” featuring scenic spots like Shillong Peak, Ward’s Lake, Elephant Falls, and a lively music and café culture.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, home to the one-horned rhinoceros, elephants, and thrilling jeep and elephant safaris.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Northeast adventure unfurls in a vibrant tapestry of culture and wilderness. Touch down in Guwahati, Assam’s bustling gateway, where you’ll seek blessings at the sacred Kamakhya Temple, drift along the mighty Brahmaputra on a scenic river cruise, and haggle for silken treasures in lively local markets. From there, ascend to Shillong—the “Scotland of the East”—to savor panoramic vistas from Shillong Peak, chase the cascading waters of Elephant Falls, and wander the colonial-era pathways around Ward’s Lake. Next, feel the mist kiss your skin in Cherrapunji, one of the wettest places on Earth, as you traverse ancient living root bridges, stand in awe beneath Nohkalikai Falls, and explore the mysterious depths of Mawsmai Caves. Finally, journey with Travelxploria into the wild heart of Kaziranga National Park, where thrilling jungle safaris bring you face-to-face with the legendary one-horned rhinoceros and a kaleidoscope of exotic wildlife—an unforgettable finale to your odyssey through India’s hidden northeast.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, discover a perfect blend of spirituality, scenic beauty, and adventure in India’s enchanting Northeast. Begin in Guwahati, Assam’s vibrant gateway, where the sacred Kamakhya Temple beckons you for a morning puja, serene cruises glide along the Brahmaputra’s mist-kissed waters, and bustling markets like Fancy Bazaar invite you to haggle for local silks and handicrafts. Next, ascend to Shillong—the “Scotland of the East”—to drink in panoramic views from Shillong Peak, stroll along the verdant banks of Ward’s Lake, chase the cascades of Elephant Falls, and unwind in its lively café culture. Finally, venture into mist-shrouded Cherrapunji, one of the world’s wettest realms, where ancient living root bridges arch over emerald streams, Nohkalikai Falls thunders into deep gorges, and the limestone caverns of Mawsmai Cave transport you into a subterranean wonderland. With every moment curated by Travelxploria, your journey becomes a tapestry of sacred rituals, breathtaking vistas, and heart-pounding adventure—an odyssey you’ll cherish long after the rain clouds have passed.

packages.overview:
Assam: A northeastern state known for its lush tea gardens, diverse wildlife, and vibrant culture.

Kaziranga: A UNESCO World Heritage site, famous for its population of Indian one-horned rhinoceroses and thrilling jeep safaris through grasslands and wetlands.

Guwahati: Assam’s largest city, home to the revered Kamakhya Temple, Umananda Island, and a picturesque setting along the Brahmaputra River.

Dibrugarh: Known as the "Tea City of India," Dibrugarh boasts expansive tea gardens, the Brahmaputra River, and scenic landscapes.

overview:
Best Meghalaya Tour Packages From Kolkata – Explore the Scotland of the East

The best Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata open the door to a world where clouds kiss the mountains, waterfalls carve emerald cliffs, and age-old tribal traditions bring the land to life. Travelxploria — one of the most trusted tour and travel agencies in India — offers expertly curated itineraries that turn your Meghalaya holiday into an unforgettable experience. Whether you seek nature escapes, romantic getaways, or cultural adventures, our packages deliver the perfect mix of comfort, value, and excitement.



Why Choose Meghalaya for Your Next Holiday from Kolkata?

Breathtaking Natural Wonders

From the misty valleys of Cherrapunji to the crystal-clear waters of Dawki, our Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata bring you closer to nature’s finest wonders. The living root bridges of Mawlynnong, Asia’s cleanest village, will leave you awestruck — a must-visit highlight in every itinerary.

Culture and Heritage

Travelxploria’s combined Assam and Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata let you experience the vibrant Khasi, Jaintia, and Garo cultures, alongside Assam’s tea gardens and ancient temples. Each journey is designed to give you a rich glimpse into the Northeast’s warmth, colors, and heritage.

Perfect for Every Type of Traveler

Whether you’re a solo explorer, a couple on a romantic getaway, or a family looking for a refreshing break, our Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata are tailored to fit your style. Choose from budget-friendly Meghalaya honeymoon packages, family vacation plans, or adventure and trekking tours — each promising unmatched comfort and authenticity.  



Top Meghalaya Itineraries from Kolkata

6 Days Best Meghalaya Tour Package from Kolkata

Perfect for first-time travelers, this itinerary covers Shillong, Cherrapunji, Dawki, and Mawlynnong. Enjoy boating in the Umngot River, exploring caves, and witnessing breathtaking waterfalls.

Assam and Meghalaya Tour Packages from Kolkata

Experience two states in one trip — wildlife adventures in Kaziranga and scenic beauty across Meghalaya. Ideal for families and nature lovers.

Customized Meghalaya Tour Packages from Kolkata

With easy flights and trains from Kolkata to Guwahati, our customizable packages ensure private transfers, comfortable hotels, and expert local guides. 



Popular Destinations Covered

  • Shillong – The “Scotland of the East,” perfect for family tour packages from Kolkata.

  • Cherrapunji – Home to the majestic Nohkalikai Falls and living root bridges.

  • Dawki – The transparent Umngot River, ideal for couples’ tours and photography.

  • Mawlynnong – Asia’s cleanest village, a highlight in every best Meghalaya package from Kolkata. 



What’s Included in Our Meghalaya Tour Packages From Kolkata

  1. Hotel/resort stays with breakfast and dinner.

  2. Private vehicle transfers from Guwahati Airport or Railway Station.

  3. Sightseeing with professional guides.

  4. Entry permits and all applicable taxes. 


Best Time to Visit Meghalaya

  • October to April: Ideal for sightseeing, pleasant weather, and cultural festivals.

  • June to September: For adventure lovers who enjoy monsoon treks and lush landscapes. 


Travel Tips for Visitors from Kolkata

  1. Pack comfortable layers and rain gear.

  2. Carry valid ID proof for permits.

  3. Book early during peak seasons (Nov–Jan, Apr–Jun) for best rates.

  4. Keep some cash handy, as ATMs may be limited in remote areas. 


Frequently Asked Questions

Q1: Do you offer Meghalaya tour packages for couples from Kolkata?
Yes, Travelxploria offers romantic Meghalaya couple tour packages from Kolkata with private stays, candlelight dinners, and Dawki river experiences.

Q2: Are there affordable Meghalaya honeymoon packages from Kolkata?
Absolutely. Our budget Meghalaya honeymoon packages include cozy resorts, scenic drives, and curated couple-friendly activities.

Q3: Do you organize adventure or trekking tours in Meghalaya?
Yes. We offer Meghalaya adventure and trekking tour packages from Kolkata, featuring root-bridge hikes, caving, and offbeat trails.

Q4: How do I reach Meghalaya from Kolkata?
Fly or take a train to Guwahati, followed by a comfortable private transfer arranged by Travelxploria to Shillong or Cherrapunji.

Q5: Can I combine Assam and Meghalaya in one trip?
Yes, our Assam and Meghalaya combined packages from Kolkata give you the best of both — Kaziranga’s wildlife and Meghalaya’s natural beauty. 


Plan Your Meghalaya Trip from Kolkata with Travelxploria

With Travelxploria’s expertly crafted Meghalaya tour packages from Kolkata, your Northeast India journey will be seamless and unforgettable. Whether you choose a family holiday, romantic escape, or offbeat adventure, our travel experts ensure comfort, value, and lasting memories every step of the way.
